ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Unique name or identifier for the character */,
  "game_index" INTEGER /* Index used for sorting and categorizing characters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of attribute (e.g., physical, magical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_attributes" (
  "character_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the character-attribute link */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-attribute link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-attribute link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_attributes_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_attributes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., health, mana) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_statistics" (
  "character_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the character-statistic link */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-statistic link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-statistic link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_statistics_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_statistics_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavors" (
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor */,
  "flavor_name" TEXT /* Name of the flavor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flavor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_flavors" (
  "character_flavor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the character-flavor link */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Indicates if the character likes or hates the flavor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-flavor link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character-flavor link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavors_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavors_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_effects" (
  "attribute_effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the attribute effect */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "effect_value" INTEGER /* Value of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_effects_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_effects_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavor_statistics" (
  "flavor_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the flavor statistic */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "effect_value" INTEGER /* Value of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flavor_statistics_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flavor_statistics_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_flavor_statistics" (
  "character_flavor_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the character flavor statistic */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "flavor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flavor */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "effect_value" INTEGER /* Value of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_flavor_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavor_statistics_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavor_statistics_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_flavor_statistics_flavor_id FOREIGN KEY ("flavor_id") REFERENCES flavors ("flavor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the game event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the game event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_game_events" (
  "character_game_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the character game event */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "effect_value" INTEGER /* Value of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_game_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_game_events_game_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("game_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_game_events_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_game_events_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES statistics ("statistic_id")
)
